title: A Better Home
description: A light and simple plugin that adds a home system like Donut SMP
body:
# Commands
- /home, After doing /home a GUI will open with 5 beds, click on one to set your current position as a home.
- /delhome <name>, to delete any home you want

# config

```
# Home System Configuration
homes:
  max-homes: 5
  teleport-delay: 5
  teleport-warmup: true
  allow-cross-dimension: true

messages:
  teleport-start: "&eTeleporting in: {time}"
  teleport-cancelled: "&cTeleport cancelled!"
  teleport-success: "&aTeleported to home!"
  home-set: "&aHome '{name}' has been set!"
  home-deleted: "&aHome '{name}' has been deleted!"
  home-limit: "&cYou can only have up to {max} homes!"
  no-permission: "&cYou don't have permission!"
```
# Showcase
